translations.app.title: CameraWebService
translations.login.title: Sign in
translations.login.subtitle: CameraWebService administration
translations.password.change.title: Change password
translations.password.change.hint: Choose a new password to continue
translations.dashboard.title: Dashboard
translations.dashboard.camera.title: Camera status
translations.dashboard.ntp.title: NTP
translations.cameras.title: Cameras
translations.cameras.name: Name
translations.cameras.filename.hint: Each camera must have a unique filename (.jpg)
translations.cameras.interval.hint: Minutes between snapshots for this camera
translations.cameras.add.title: Add camera
translations.schedule.title: Schedule
translations.schedule.ntp.title: NTP time sync
translations.schedule.ntp.server.hint: Used to verify the system clock before capture
translations.schedule.dark.title: Global pause periods
translations.schedule.dark.description: Applies to all cameras without their own pause schedule. Supports overnight ranges (e.g. 22:00–06:00).
translations.schedule.dark.label: Description
translations.schedule.cameras.title: Camera pause schedules
translations.schedule.cameras.description: Per-camera pause schedule. Cameras without a schedule use the global pause periods above.
translations.schedule.cameras.pause.empty: No pause periods — captures around the clock.
translations.upload.title: Upload
translations.settings.title: Settings
translations.settings.timezone.hint: IANA timezone — e.g. Europe/Copenhagen, UTC, America/New_York
translations.settings.hosts.hint: One hostname per line. For reference only — the service accepts all connections.
translations.settings.healthchecks.url.hint: Optional. Pinged after every successful upload; /fail is pinged on error. See healthchecks.io.
translations.settings.timezone_note: Timezone changes take effect on the next capture cycle.
translations.network.title: Network
translations.network.hostname.title: Hostname
translations.network.hostname.hint: Device network name (e.g. camera-pi). Use only letters, numbers and hyphens.
translations.network.hostname.warning: Restart the device after changing the hostname for it to take full effect.
translations.network.hostname.success: Hostname updated. Restart the device to apply the change.
translations.network.hostname.invalid: Invalid hostname — use only letters (a-z), numbers and hyphens.
translations.network.interfaces.title: Network interfaces
translations.network.static.title: Static IP configuration
translations.network.static.success: Network settings saved. Restart to apply changes.
translations.network.permission.warning: Changing hostname and IP requires the service to run with system privileges (root/sudo). Save buttons are disabled if permissions are missing.
translations.language.title: Language / Sprog
translations.language.add_hint: Add new language files to the language/ folder to make them available here.
translations.language.upload.title: Upload language file
translations.language.upload.desc: Upload a new .json language file directly to the server. The file must contain locale and translations fields.
translations.language.upload.label: Choose .json file
translations.language.download.title: Download language files
translations.language.download.desc: Download the installed language files as .json — use them as templates for new translations.
translations.logs.title: Logs
translations.backup.title: Backup
translations.backup.download.title: Download backup
translations.backup.download.desc: Downloads all settings as an XML file.
translations.backup.full.title: Full backup
translations.backup.full.subtitle: incl. passwords and tokens
translations.backup.full.desc: Contains everything. Store securely and do not share. Use to migrate to new hardware.
translations.backup.noauth.title: Backup without passwords
translations.backup.noauth.subtitle: safe to share
translations.backup.noauth.desc: Passwords, API tokens and session key are removed. Requires a new password on restore.
translations.backup.restore.title: Restore from backup
translations.backup.restore.desc: Upload a previously exported XML file. The existing configuration will be completely overwritten.
translations.backup.restore.label: Choose backup file
translations.backup.restore.hint: Only .xml files exported from this system
translations.backup.restore.confirm: Overwrite all configuration with the uploaded backup?
translations.backup.restore.success: Configuration restored. Restart the service if the scheduler does not respond.
translations.backup.sensitive.warning: This file contains passwords and tokens. Store it securely and do not share it.
